achievements.unlockCondition: 以低于 30 生命值 击杀 无畏舰
achievements.enUnlockCondition: Kill the dreadnaught while you have less than 30 HP

equipments.name: 商店折扣券
equipments.effect: 商店打折，生态专精初期值得刷
equipments.officialEffect: Gives a 20% discount to all shop purchases.

equipments.name: 集团配发磁铁
equipments.effect: 自身拾取弱时拿，增强拾取能力
equipments.officialEffect: Spawns a magnet at the end of a stage that collects 50% of the XP.

equipments.name: 红糖块
equipments.effect: 吃红糖加血量上限，多碰瓷吃红糖
equipments.officialEffect: Collecting Red Sugar increases your Max HP by 3.

equipments.name: 挖矿概率得黄金/硝石/经验
equipments.effect: 挖矿时概率获得资源，适合钻机/高挖速
equipments.officialName: Gold Scanner / Nitra Scanner / XP Scanner
equipments.officialEffect: Small chance to find Gold/Nitra/XP when mining rock.

equipments.name: 记仇名单
equipments.effect: 受伤获得经验，熔岩之心碰瓷岩浆好用
equipments.officialEffect: +10% XP Gain; Gain XP when you take damage.

equipments.name: 武器补给箱
equipments.effect: 抽别的职业武器，上下限大，勿轻易开
equipments.officialEffect: Equip an additional random level 6 weapon with a random overclock.

equipments.name: 复古知识库
equipments.effect: 直升 3 级，后期 T2
equipments.officialEffect: Gain 3 Levels.

equipments.name: 侧目目镜 / EE5 目镜
equipments.officialEffect: +30% Critical Chance, +100% Critical Damage, -30% Damage.

equipments.name: P2W 控制器
equipments.effect: 原版每分钟-50黄金+100%伤；新版本改永久叠伤
equipments.officialEffect: +2.5% damage whenever you reroll, stacks up to 100.

equipments.name: 涡轮解码器
equipments.effect: 降挖速，加伤和装填；小心被地刺困
equipments.officialEffect: +3% Damage, +3% Reload Speed, -5% Mining Speed for every equipped Overclock.

equipments.name: 三明治
equipments.effect: 回血，配能量棒抵消扣血
equipments.officialEffect: Tactical Cookie：进入逃生舱时回复 50% 最大生命值（待核：官方无 exact 对应）

equipments.name: 椒盐卷饼
equipments.effect: 回血，配狂人头盔提低血脉容错
equipments.officialEffect: +1 Armor for every 2% of missing HP.

equipments.name: 能量棒
equipments.effect: 配三明治
equipments.officialEffect: +1% Damage, -3 Max HP for every player level.

equipments.name: 挖他命
equipments.effect: 提升升级回复血量，后期收益低
equipments.officialEffect: Vita-miner Pills：+5% 最大生命值；升级时提升治疗效果（待核：官方无 exact 对应）

equipments.name: 狂人头盔
equipments.effect: 低血量容错，配椒盐卷饼/三明治
equipments.officialEffect: —（待核）

equipments.name: 腌制硝石
equipments.effect: 加伤，直伤流关键
equipments.officialEffect: +2% Damage and -0.5% Move Speed for every Nitra you have.

equipments.name: 反射调节仪
equipments.effect: 每次受伤+5%闪避，最高 5 层
equipments.officialEffect: +5% Armor; +5% Dodge for 10s when taking damage, stacks 5.

equipments.name: 护甲润滑油
equipments.effect: +10% 闪避加成
equipments.relatedAchievement: 油滑矮人（Slick, like butter / Greased Little Dwarf）
equipments.officialEffect: +5% Move Speed; +2% Dodge while moving, stacks 5.

equipments.name: 硝基火药
equipments.effect: 加暴击率
equipments.relatedAchievement: 硝石井喷（Sprinkle of Nitra，收集 2000 Nitra）
equipments.officialEffect: +0.5% Critical Chance for every Nitra, max 500 stacks.

equipments.name: 嗜矿异虫召唤装备
equipments.effect: 一次性召唤 4 只嗜矿异虫，全杀收益高
equipments.relatedAchievement: 永不空军（Got bait?，单次击杀 3 只 Huuli Hoarders）
equipments.officialEffect: Lure out a bunch of Huuli Hoarders.
